ChangeNotes.Value: [h3]What's new[/h3][list][*]Fixed: a crash on older game versions (v1.3.4 and up, since the War Sails launch) caused by TaleWorlds changing a naval method between versions and a Navigator property that older builds do not have. The mod now adapts to both.[*]Fixed: on older game versions, travelling on water gave Shipmaster experience to every hero in the party. It is now correctly limited to the party leader (and the Navigator on newer versions).[*]Improved: Harmony patches are now applied individually, so a future game update that breaks one hook can no longer stop the whole mod from loading.[/list]
